title: Weather: Morning fog in places in the south, otherwise fine and cool
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Find out what...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Find out what the latest weather forecast from the SA Weather Service means for your region for 26 August.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeMorning fog patches in places over the southern parts, otherwise fine and cool to warm but partly cloudy over the southern parts in the morning. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south-easterly to southerly along the west coast, otherwise light to moderate easterly.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog in places in the south, otherwise fine and cool. The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly in the morning, otherwise light easterly becoming north-easterly in the evening.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog in places along the escarpment, otherwise fine and cool becoming partly cloudy south of the escarpment from late afternoon. The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly in the morning, otherwise easterly, becoming moderate north-easterly.


> Expected temperatures on Tuesday:



> Forecast for Wednesday 27 August:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
